d: Salazer summons plenty of Flying Swords to launch [[9]] strikes to an enemy with the highest HP. Each strike deals [[30%]]<ATK> damage plus damage equal to [[5%]] of the target's current HP. Additional damage cannot exceed [[150%]] of Salazer's ATK. Salazer prioritizes the enemy with the most HP.
The damage dealt by this skill grants Salazer [[50]] Life Drain.
The damage of each strike is increased to [[32%]]<ATK> plus damage equal to [[5.5%]] of the target's current HP.
The damage of each strike is increased to [[34%]]<ATK> plus damage equal to [[6%]] of the target's current HP.
The damage of each strike is increased to [[36%]]<ATK> plus damage equal to [[6.5%]] of the target's current HP.

Salazer whips enemies within a [[2]]-tile arc, dealing [[180%]]<ATK> damage. When the target's HP ratio drops below [[70%]], Salazer launches one more attack to enemies within a [[2]]-tile arc, dealing [[230%]]<ATK> damage.
Increases the damage to [[185%]]<ATK> and the damage of the additional whip attack to [[235%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage to [[190%]]<ATK> and the damage of the additional whip attack to [[240%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage to [[200%]]<ATK> and the damage of the additional whip attack to [[250%]]<ATK>.
Salazer imprisons an enemy whose HP ratio is less than [[70%]], dealing [[300%]]<ATK> damage and making them unable to move or act for [[5]]s. The skill can only be applied to each enemy once.
Every time Salazer imprisons an enemy, he absorbs [[8%]] of the enemy's ATK until the battle ends. This skill can absorb up to [[50%]] of Salazer's ATK in each battle.
Every time Salazer imprisons an enemy, he absorbs [[10%]] of the enemy's ATK until the battle ends. This skill can absorb up to [[50%]] of Salazer's ATK in each battle.
Every time Salazer imprisons an enemy, he absorbs [[12%]] of the enemy's ATK until the battle ends. This skill can absorb up to [[50%]] of Salazer's ATK in each battle.
Reduces damage taken by [[12%]] during battle.
Reduces damage taken by [[16%]] during battle.
Reduces damage taken by [[20%]] during battle.
Salazer immerses himself in the power of the Spirits and casts Enraptured Whip [[1]] times without cooldown when a battle starts or an enemy is imprisoned. An extra whip strike will be attempted.
The Enraptured Whip deals additional damage equal to [[5%]] of the enemy's current HP, granting [[50]] Life Drain to Salazer. The additional damage cannot exceed [[150%]] of Salazer's ATK.
Casts Enraptured Whip [[2]] times without cooldown.
The Enraptured Whip deals additional damage equal to [[5.5%]] of the enemy's current HP, granting [[52]] Life Drain to Salazer. The additional damage cannot exceed [[160%]] of Salazer's ATK.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, gains [[15]] Penetration and [[15]] Haste for [[5]]s when a battle starts and when [[assisting or defeating]] an enemy.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 Life Drain, 10 Haste.

d: Salazer recovers [[150%]]<ATK> HP for every imprisoned enemy.

Salazer increases the damage of Spirit Shackles by [[60%]]. Each time an enemy that he has previously imprisoned is defeated, grants him a shield equal to [[100%]] of that enemy's max HP. The shield lasts for [[15]]s, and its value cannot exceed [[1500%]] of Salazer's ATK.
